hero.description: Frontend-focused Fullstack developer specialized in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and React Native. I build scalable, high-performance web and mobile applications with clean code, strong UX, and production-ready engineering practices.

techStack.title: Technology Stack
techStack.description: Technologies and tools I use to build scalable and modern applications.

technologies.react: Modern UI library for building interactive components
technologies.reactNative: Framework for building native mobile apps using React
technologies.next: Full-stack framework for optimized web applications
technologies.typescript: Strongly typed JavaScript for safer and scalable code
technologies.javascript: Core programming language of modern web applications
technologies.node: JavaScript runtime for backend and server development
technologies.express: Minimalist web framework for Node.js applications
technologies.tailwind: Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development
technologies.framer: Animation library for building smooth UI interactions
technologies.mongodb: NoSQL document-oriented database for storing and managing scalable, flexible data
technologies.git: Version control system for collaboration and code tracking

timeline.title: Professional Journey
timeline.description: Crafting modern web applications with strong performance, reusable components, and collaborative development alongside product teams.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer – React.js / Next.js
experiences.description: Designing and implementing high-performance web interfaces with React.js and Next.js, boosting page fluidity and load times by over 30%. Built reusable and scalable UI components to ensure visual consistency and maintainable code. Managed application state with Redux and integrated REST APIs via Axios for optimized data flow. Collaborated closely with the product team to translate functional requirements into effective technical solutions. Standardized development and build environments using Docker, streamlining team workflows. Conducted code reviews, unit testing, and continuous optimizations, reducing critical bugs and crashes by 15–20%.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer – React.js / React Native
experiences.description: Developed responsive and high-performance web and mobile interfaces with React.js and React Native, improving page fluidity by 30%+. Created reusable UI components to maintain design consistency and long-term scalability. Managed client-side state with Redux and integrated APIs for fast, reliable interactions. Participated in code reviews and best practices adoption, significantly reducing critical bugs and improving code quality.

experiences.title: Fullstack JavaScript Developer Intern
experiences.description: Built a full-featured e-commerce platform using React.js for frontend and Node.js/Express for backend. Implemented unit testing with Jest to ensure application reliability. Optimized state management with Redux, reducing unnecessary re-renders by 25%. Collaborated effectively via Git workflows and code reviews, gaining hands-on experience in full-stack development and team-based project delivery.

about.title: How I Engineer Frontend Applications
about.description: I combine modern frameworks, scalable architecture, and performance-driven practices to deliver reliable and maintainable applications.

expertise.performanceDesc: Improving Core Web Vitals, optimizing rendering performance, lazy loading, and efficient state management using Redux, Zustand, and React Query.
expertise.accessibilityDesc: Building inclusive and user-friendly interfaces using semantic HTML, accessibility standards, and strong UX principles.
expertise.designDesc: Translating Figma and UI designs into scalable and reusable component systems using Tailwind CSS and modern design patterns.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Showcasing real-world applications focused on performance, real-time collaboration, and scalable architecture.
projects.noProjects: No projects found in this category yet. Check back soon!

items.title: Split & Plan – Social Expense Organizer
items.description: A real-time mobile application that helps groups organize outings, split expenses, and track shared purchases effortlessly. Users can create events, add expenses, monitor balances between participants, and communicate through integrated real-time chat. Built with scalable backend architecture and WebSocket technology to ensure instant updates and smooth collaboration.

items.title: Realtime Chat Application
items.description: A modern mobile chat application providing seamless real-time messaging with optimized performance and responsive user experience. Features include instant message delivery, conversation management, and scalable communication powered by WebSocket technology and a robust backend infrastructure.

items.title: Construction Project Management Platform
items.description: A web-based platform designed to manage construction projects efficiently. The application allows teams to track chantier progress, manage tasks, monitor incidents, and analyze project indicators through a clear and intuitive dashboard. Built with a modern frontend architecture focused on performance, maintainability, and user productivity.

items.title: Gym & Fitness Website
items.description: A modern and high-performance website designed for a gym and fitness center. The platform showcases training programs, class schedules, membership plans, and coach profiles with a clean and engaging user interface. Built with a responsive design approach to ensure a smooth experience across all devices, the website focuses on visual impact, fast loading times, and clear call-to-action sections to convert visitors into members.

items.title: Personal Portfolio Website
items.description: A personal portfolio website built to showcase professional projects, technical skills, and experience in a clean and elegant way. The application highlights selected works, detailed project pages, and a strong personal brand through smooth animations and a refined UI. Developed with a modern component-based architecture to ensure scalability, accessibility, and excellent performance.
